textByHash.0230b18ad875dccf292b970689a85550f48aa8fc: No gnome can blame you for what you do not know.
textByHash.02eeb110858615df29512326a8a12516b37ba5bf: As you should have. I sought only to strengthen the Gnomish Kingdoms, just like you did.
textByHash.0ca96c140d1cceeac0ae198e91e4afaac7c68e8e: Only the naive believe they can rule without someone like me.
textByHash.249ab9544529df71d8b867d117ef318e081225e4: Your empire will crack and the gnomes will become but a joke.
textByHash.42766e814edc4276c0659eead4be2fd186c12f48: I live to serve you sire. I work for the good of us all.
textByHash.4d47b1704fdb217fa5f61d04bec3ea183ba34db5: No, I simply told you what you wanted to hear, Bolrie. Never forget that...
textByHash.a34841d968ad182e7792e061163e21610f7ec494: Some things are best kept secret...
textByHash.bf4e53cdeb385b63e31e4497e70ae7358879204e: So be it. I'll be watching.
